title: Balloonable
description: Allows this entity to have a balloon attached and defines the conditions and events for this entity when is ballooned.

soft_distance.description: Distance in blocks at which the 'spring' effect that lifts it.

max_distance.description: Distance in blocks at which the balloon breaks.

on_balloon.description: Event to call when this entity is ballooned.

on_unballoon.description: Event to call when this entity is unballooned.

mass.description: Mass that this entity will have when computing balloon pull forces.
